attributes.action: More adequate set times for the royal rumble takeover at boomtown
attributes.additional_details: Crossy x Gray x Harriet Jaxxon and BennyL x Skeptical x Break deserve later night set times. Crossy b2b Gray at Boomtown 2023 became one of the festival’s most talked-about sets largely because the late-night slot allowed the full lights, lasers, visuals, and crowd energy to elevate the experience. These artists thrive in that atmosphere, and most Boomtown citizens would agree these sets would hit far harder after dark.
attributes.background: Move Crossy x Gray x Harriet Jaxxon and BennyL x Skeptical x Break to later night slots. Their sound and energy deserve peak lights, visuals, and production — and most Boomtown citizens would agree these sets would hit far harder after dark.
